name: Utilidade cn() e dependencias
description: Criar src/lib/utils.ts com funcao cn() (clsx + tailwind-merge). Adicionar deps Radix e utilitarias ao package.json (collapsible, dialog, scroll-area, separator, cva, tailwind-merge). Remover export './styles.css' do campo exports do package.json. Validar: cn() exportada, deps declaradas, export styles.css ausente.

package.json NAO contem './styles.css' no campo exports

name: ChartRenderer com cores CSS var
description: Reescrever ChartRenderer.tsx para usar Card do shadcn como wrapper e cores via var(--chart-1) a var(--chart-5) do host. Manter recharts como dep de comportamento. Eixos/grid usam var(--border), labels usam var(--muted-foreground). Suportar Bar, Line, Pie, Area. Zero classe ai-chat-display-chart, zero cor HSL/hex hardcoded.
tests: ChartRenderer usa Card do shadcn como wrapper
Cores das series usam CHART_COLORS com var(--chart-1) a var(--chart-5)
Zero hsl(), oklch(), #hex, rgb() hardcoded no arquivo

name: Chat.tsx com tokens shadcn
description: Reescrever Chat.tsx: substituir classe 'ai-chat' por cn('flex flex-col h-full bg-background text-foreground', className). Remover qualquer import de styles.css. Substituir clsx por cn. Manter ChatProvider wrapper e toda a logica intacta. API publica identica.
tests: Chat.tsx usa cn() em vez de clsx ou join()
Chat.tsx usa bg-background text-foreground — zero classe 'ai-chat'

name: MessageList.tsx com ScrollArea
description: Reescrever MessageList.tsx: substituir div.ai-chat-list por ScrollArea do shadcn. Mensagens em flex col gap-3 p-4. Empty state com text-muted-foreground. Manter logica de auto-scroll inteligente (threshold 100px do bottom) e isStreaming na ultima mensagem assistant.
tests: MessageList usa ScrollArea do shadcn (importa de ../ui/scroll-area)
isStreaming na ultima mensagem assistant mantido

name: MessageBubble.tsx com tokens shadcn
description: Reescrever MessageBubble.tsx: user bubble com bg-primary text-primary-foreground, rounded-br-sm. Assistant bubble com bg-muted text-foreground, rounded-bl-sm. Ambos max-w-[80%]. Manter iteracao de message.parts via PartRenderer e fallback para message.content via Markdown. Zero classe ai-chat-bubble.

name: MessageInput.tsx com Button shadcn
description: Reescrever MessageInput.tsx: usar Button do shadcn para send (size icon) e abort (variant destructive). Textarea com bg-transparent, text-foreground, placeholder:text-muted-foreground. Container com border border-input bg-background rounded-xl. Manter auto-expand (1-6 rows), Enter para enviar, Shift+Enter nova linha, focus automatico.
tests: MessageInput usa Button do shadcn (importa de ../ui/button)

name: Markdown.tsx com tokens Tailwind
description: Reescrever Markdown.tsx: substituir classes ai-chat-markdown/ai-chat-code-block/ai-chat-inline-code por tokens Tailwind nos components override do react-markdown. Pre: bg-muted border rounded-md. Code inline: bg-muted border rounded-sm font-mono. Links: text-primary underline. Blockquotes: border-l-[3px] border-border text-muted-foreground. Tables: border border-border. Container com selectores [&_p]:mb-3 etc. Manter remark-gfm e rehype-highlight. NAO usar @tailwindcss/typography.
tests: Code blocks usam bg-muted border border-border font-mono
Inline code usa bg-muted border border-border rounded-sm
Zero hsl(), oklch(), #hex, rgb() no arquivo

name: StreamingIndicator.tsx com animate-pulse
description: Reescrever StreamingIndicator.tsx: substituir animacao CSS ai-chat-blink por animate-pulse do Tailwind. Cursor: span com inline-block w-2 h-4 align-text-bottom bg-current animate-pulse. bg-current herda cor do texto pai.
tests: Zero referencia a ai-chat-blink ou animacao CSS customizada
bg-current herda cor do texto pai

name: ReasoningBlock.tsx com Collapsible shadcn
description: Reescrever ReasoningBlock.tsx: usar Collapsible/CollapsibleTrigger/CollapsibleContent do shadcn. Container bg-muted/50 border border-border rounded-md. Trigger com Brain icon, texto 'Raciocinio', chevron. Conteudo com max-h-96 overflow-y-auto text-muted-foreground. Manter logica de expanded state e auto-colapso apos streaming.
tests: Icones Brain, ChevronDown, ChevronRight de lucide-react
Logica de expanded state e auto-colapso mantida

name: ToolActivity.tsx com tokens semanticos
description: Reescrever ToolActivity.tsx: container com flex items-center gap-2 rounded-md border bg-muted/50. Icon com text-primary. Tool name com font-medium font-mono. Spinner ativo com Loader2 animate-spin. Check concluido com text-primary (decisao D-010, zero cor hardcoded). Zero classe ai-chat-tool-activity.

Check de conclusao usa text-primary (nao text-green-500)
Zero hsl(), oklch(), #hex, rgb() no arquivo

name: ToolResult.tsx com Collapsible shadcn
description: Reescrever ToolResult.tsx: usar Collapsible/CollapsibleTrigger/CollapsibleContent do shadcn. Container rounded-md border bg-muted/50. Trigger com icon, toolName font-mono, chevron. Erro: text-destructive. Sucesso: text-foreground. Conteudo em pre com max-h-80 font-mono text-xs bg-muted. Manter logica de expanded state e serializacao.

name: AlertRenderer.tsx com Alert shadcn
description: Reescrever AlertRenderer.tsx: usar Alert/AlertTitle/AlertDescription do shadcn. Mapeamento: error → variant destructive; success/info/warning/default → variant default (decisao D-011, success sem cor extra — icone CheckCircle comunica semantica). Zero classe ai-chat-display-alert.

name: Validacao zero cor hardcoded
